ppeo:hasName.rdfs:label: Observation Unit ID/Name*
ppeo:hasName.rdfs:comment: Unique identifier or human-readable label for the observation unit (required).

ppeo:hasDescription.rdfs:label: Observation Unit description
ppeo:hasDescription.rdfs:comment: Narrative description (e.g., plot, plant, pot) and any notable details.

ppeo:hasObservationUnitType.rdfs:label: Observation Unit type
ppeo:hasObservationUnitType.rdfs:comment: Type/category such as plot, subplot, plant, pot, tray, etc.

ppeo:hasSpatialDistribution.rdfs:label: Spatial distribution
ppeo:hasSpatialDistribution.rdfs:comment: Spatial layout or location info (e.g., block/row/column; coordinates; polygon reference).

ppeo:hasTemporalDistribution.rdfs:label: Temporal distribution
ppeo:hasTemporalDistribution.rdfs:comment: Temporal extent or schedule relevant to this observation unit (e.g., sowing-to-harvest window).

ppeo:hasGeographicLocation.rdfs:label: Geographic location
ppeo:hasGeographicLocation.rdfs:comment: Place name, site code, or geodetic coordinates for the unit (if applicable).

ppeo:isPartOf.rdfs:label: Part of Study*
ppeo:isPartOf.rdfs:comment: Link to the parent Study by @id.

sosa:observedProperty.rdfs:label: Observed Variable
sosa:observedProperty.rdfs:comment: Link to the observed variable by @id.

ppeo:hasRelatedSynonym.rdfs:label: Synonym
ppeo:hasRelatedSynonym.rdfs:comment: Observation Unit corresponds conceptually to a SOSA Observation.
